temporal_description: A low-angle, close-up shot shows a man's face illuminated in a dark, shadowy environment. He is lying on what appears to be a wooden surface, possibly a table or floor. He wears a dark, patterned sweater. His face is contorted in an expression of extreme anguish or pain, with his mouth open as if screaming. The background is almost entirely black, with only faint hints of a dark, textured surface behind him. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains static, focusing on the man's pained expression. The audio is dominated by a powerful and dramatic orchestral score, creating a sense of immense scale and high stakes. It begins with a low, resonant, and ominous tone that quickly swells into a grand, sweeping, and epic melody. The music is cinematic and full of tension, evoking the feeling of a high-fantasy adventure or a momentous, climactic event. There is no dialogue or narration in the audio. The scene cuts to a very dark, almost completely black view. The camera pans slowly across a dark, indistinct landscape. In the distance, the faint, warm glow of lights from a large, illuminated structure, possibly a castle or a city, becomes visible. The surrounding area is shrouded in deep shadow, with only a few scattered, dim points of light. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera continues its slow pan across the dark, mysterious landscape. The illuminated structure in the background becomes more defined, revealing a large, sprawling building with many lit windows. The foreground is a dark, textured ground, possibly grass or earth, barely visible in the near-total darkness. The camera movement is smooth and deliberate, emphasizing the vastness and mystery of the dark environment. The "风行网" watermark is still present.
